owner.name: Bao Truong
owner.title: Software Engineer
owner.bio: Hi, I'm Bao Truong, a web developer since 2021 with 5 years of experience building responsive, user-friendly websites and web applications. I specialize in JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and Node.js, and I focus on delivering high-quality, practical solutions that balance user experience, maintainability, and performance.
owner.tagline: Building reliable web products with clean code and thoughtful UX.
